name: education_whistleblower_allegation_northpine_lib_eq
premise: A gifted program lottery algorithm is being questioned after a neighborhood received zero seats two years running. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education whistleblower allegation northpine lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Zara Chandra
agents.identity: I am Zara Chandra, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Silva
agents.identity: I am Noah Silva, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Zara Chandra must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Zara Chandra do?
